title: Derive reactive surface from qualified Release 1211
description: Pin the Release 1211 manifest and artifact hash as the exact base for surface-world reactivity.
close_reason: The stage validates Tara's tree, Release 1211, and its artifact SHA-256 before applying surface changes.

title: Port proximity-safe white-house and front-door reactions
description: Add repeated knocking, listening, roof-climb explanation, and physical house responses without changing entry routes or allowing remote actions.
close_reason: Adjacent house and front-door wrappers pass real-map routes, while the native forest route rejects remote knock, listen, and climb actions.

title: Port board and boarded-window reactivity
description: Add inspection, knocking, listening, damage responses, persistent scarring, and the painted splinter.
close_reason: Real sword damage exposes the persistent splinter without opening or bypassing the secured entrance.

title: Port kitchen-window reactions
description: Add knocking and listening while preserving original open, close, inspect, and traversal behavior.
close_reason: The shared route opens and traverses the original window after proving the new reactions.

title: Port mailbox and maintenance-slip discovery
description: Add mailbox sound responses and reveal the hidden maintenance slip after the leaflet is removed.
close_reason: The real mailbox sequence discovers, takes, and reads the normal persistent maintenance-slip object in both VMs.

title: Port ordinary forest and tree reactions
description: Add examination and listening responses without adding rooms or changing the forest graph.
close_reason: Native routes prove forest and tree reactions while all canonical navigation remains delegated.

title: Port songbird reactions without optional geography
description: Add listening and greeting while retaining Tara's refusal to follow the bird.
close_reason: LISTEN TO and HELLO pass, FOLLOW remains refused, and Hidden Glade is absent from the native transcript.

title: Surface persistent state through RECAP
description: Extend qualified assistance recap with only board damage, mailbox discovery, and adjacent house knocking.
close_reason: RECAP reports established surface changes without importing remote knock attempts, optional geography, or later NPC state.

title: Qualify surface behavior across Z-machine and Glulx
description: Run the same real-map route in Expanded Release 121 and Reactive Surface Release 1212 plus native proximity and exclusion routes.
close_reason: Canonical-grammar cross-VM routes pass house, mailbox, window, board, recap, forest, and songbird milestones; native routes enforce house proximity and exclude Hidden Glade.

title: Lock and publish Release 1212
description: Commit the artifact identity, fail-closed CI, qualification records, completed beadtrain, and next underground boundary.
close_reason: Release 1212 is locked at 189440 bytes, checksum 0x01ea5062, and SHA-256 78bbfd36d03c29714c4ccf0aac45f314568db1ef60aa37732167891a7329e002 after the proximity correction.
